summary: Designed the SprintFoundry marketing website UI for website-v1. Produced a complete dark-theme design system with 6 agent accent colors, user flows for 3 visitor personas, and detailed component specifications for all 13 components across the 4 required sections (Hero, Features, How It Works, Pricing) plus global navigation and footer. All states, responsive behavior, animations, and WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility requirements are documented.
